subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letters were received and brought joy and gladness, for they bore tidings of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه های شما رسید و سبب فرح و سرور گردید زیرا مژده از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
